title: antiaris toxicaria
intro: Antiaris toxicaria, also known as the Sterculiaceae family's poison tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Antiaris toxicaria lie in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Antiaris toxicaria include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the bark and roots of the plant are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tonics, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity.
